ForWhom.title: One AI. Three businesses. All winning.
ForWhom.subtitle: Whether you run a restaurant, a wine store, or an online shop — Wineater fits in how you work and helps your customers choose with confidence.

ProblemBanner.title2: Not because customers don't want it.
ProblemBanner.desc: They want it — they just don't know which one to pick. And when there's no one to guide them, they don't buy. That's a problem for every restaurant, store, and online shop selling wine.
ProblemBanner.stat1: of wine shoppers feel unconfident selecting a bottle
ProblemBanner.stat2: say they don't get helpful guidance in venues
ProblemBanner.stat3: more likely to buy when they get a personalized recommendation
ProblemBanner.pain1Text: Customers pick the cheapest wine they recognize — or leave without buying. There's no one to guide them through 200 options.
ProblemBanner.pain2Text: Guests want a wine recommendation with their meal but staff are busy. The upsell moment passes. Revenue stays on the table.
ProblemBanner.pain3Text: Wine has the highest bounce rate in F&B e-commerce. Choice paralysis drives visitors away before they complete the purchase.

HowToStart.title: Up and running
HowToStart.subtitle: No long integrations. No complex setup. Share your wine catalog, we configure Wineater for your business, you start seeing results.
HowToStart.step1Text: Export your wine list as CSV or connect via API. Takes less than a day.
HowToStart.step2Text: Our team sets up the AI with your inventory within 24 hours.
HowToStart.step3Text: QR code, widget embed, or API link — your choice, takes 1 hour.
HowToStart.step4Text: Customers engage, buy with confidence, and come back.
HowToStart.qrDesc: Print a QR code, place it at tables or near wine shelves. That's it. Your customers scan and get instant personalized recommendations.
HowToStart.widgetDesc: Add a single JavaScript snippet to your site. Wineater widget appears on your wine pages and starts converting visitors immediately.
HowToStart.apiDesc: Connect Wineater directly to your search or recommendation engine. Full control, fully branded, zero Wineater footprint on the front end.
HowToStart.trialTitle: Try it with your real catalog
HowToStart.trialDesc: No commitment. Share your wine list, we set everything up, you run it for a month and see exactly what it does for your business.

playground.BeSureToProvideDetails: Elevate your dining experience with Wineater, the expert in perfect wine pairings for your meal. Simply provide your dish details, and we'll recommend the ideal wine companion
playground.WhatDoYouWannaEat: What's on your plate? e.g., Tuna Salad

scienceBehind.text: Users input the dish they plan to enjoy, and our AI algorithm will analyze their responses to suggest a selection of wines that complement the food based on science principles of food and wine pairing
scienceBehind.title: The science behind

startBanner.eyebrow: AI Sommelier for restaurants, bars & wine stores
startBanner.subtitle: Your customers want the perfect wine. They just don't know which one. Wineater's AI gives personalized recommendations in seconds — from your inventory, for any query.
